name: cashsnap_webgl_environment_banks_v1
description: Review registry for WebGL equirectangular environment-map banks. Environment maps may add visual lighting/reflection variation, but trainable renders require reviewed CC0 source/license metadata.

banks.source_policy: CC0 equirectangular HDR/LDR environment maps only; record source_url, license, license_url, and credit per asset before use.
banks.blocker: No environment maps have been downloaded, reviewed, or registered into this project config yet.
